scripts.build:knowledge-seed: pnpm build:source-ops-metadata && pnpm build:terms && pnpm detect:updates && node scripts/generate-knowledge-seed.mjs && pnpm build:alias-queue
scripts.check:knowledge-memory: pnpm export:knowledge-memory && git diff --exit-code data/knowledge/source-ops-metadata.json data/knowledge/knowledge-memory.json docs/wiki/knowledge-memory.md
scripts.check:knowledge-playbooks: pnpm export:knowledge-playbooks && git diff --exit-code data/knowledge/source-ops-metadata.json data/knowledge/knowledge-memory.json data/knowledge/product-routing-matrix.json data/knowledge/evidence-bundle-templates.json docs/wiki/knowledge-memory.md docs/wiki/product-routing-matrix.md docs/wiki/evidence-bundles
scripts.preflight:supabase-knowledge: pnpm split:knowledge-seed && pnpm audit:knowledge-ops && node scripts/preflight-supabase-knowledge.mjs
scripts.check:knowledge-drift: pnpm build:source-ops-metadata && pnpm build:knowledge-seed && pnpm export:knowledge-playbooks && git diff --exit-code data/knowledge/source-ops-metadata.json data/knowledge/term-index.json data/knowledge/regulatory-update-queue.json data/knowledge/alias-review-queue.json data/knowledge/knowledge-memory.json data/knowledge/product-routing-matrix.json data/knowledge/evidence-bundle-templates.json docs/wiki/knowledge-memory.md docs/wiki/product-routing-matrix.md docs/wiki/evidence-bundles supabase/knowledge-seed.sql
scripts.preflight:deploy: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm audit:ui-shell && pnpm test:rules && pnpm check:knowledge-drift && pnpm preflight:supabase-knowledge && pnpm build && pnpm preflight:deployment
